raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX and XXXX, There were 2 unauthorized charges on my goodyear credit card. 
This account had been hijacked and a hacker used it to make unauthorized purchases. 

I notified XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX when I noticed these bogus charges and told them what happened. I also closed my account with them on that same day. 

Citi Goodyear decided I was at fault and refused to dismiss the charges.

I've attached the letter I was sent. 



I can not afford to pay this fraudulent charge. What recourse do I have?
